Example 1 View on Page
The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
Mode: light

Mode: light

XPath: /p[@class="post-type government"]
81 Critical alfa SC 1.1.1 A SIA-R14: Images have an accessible name or are decorative #
17 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Content Author

Blocking: ⚠️ Yes (Task-Blocking)

WCAG: SC 1.1.1 A

Affected Pages

  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/ (3 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/5/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/10/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/15/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/23/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/26/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/31/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/32/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/38/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/45/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/67/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/72/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/75/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/80/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/agencias-departamentos-del-estado-de-texas/ (3 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/agencias-departamentos-del-estado-de-texas/12/ (5 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/vivir-en-texas/directorio-de-impuestos-propiedad/3/ (5 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The visible text content of the element is not included within its accessible name
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__search-btn" aria-label="Search" data-testid="search-submit">Buscar</button>
XPath: /button[@class="searchbox__search-btn"]
Example 2 View on Page
The visible text content of the element is not included within its accessible name
Mode: light
<a data-testid="page-link" aria-label="Navigate to next page" class="pagination__next " href="/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/2/#results-start">...</a>
XPath: /a[@class="pagination__next "]
Example 3 View on Page
The visible text content of the element is not included within its accessible name
Mode: light
<a data-testid="page-link" aria-label="Navigate to last page" class="pagination__last " href="/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/86/#results-start">...</a>
XPath: /a[@class="pagination__last "]
Example 4 View on Page
The visible text content of the element is not included within its accessible name
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__search-btn" aria-label="Search" data-testid="search-submit">Buscar</button>
XPath: /button[@class="searchbox__search-btn"]
Example 5 View on Page
The visible text content of the element is not included within its accessible name
Mode: light
<a data-testid="page-link" aria-label="Navigate to first page" class="pagination__first " href="/es/directorio-servicios-gubernamentales/#results-start">...</a>
XPath: /a[@class="pagination__first "]

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Target has insufficient size and spacing
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon" data-testid="clear-search" type="reset" aria-label="Clear Search">...</button>
XPath: /button[@class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon"]
Example 2 View on Page
Target has insufficient size and spacing
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon" data-testid="clear-search" type="reset" aria-label="Clear Search">...</button>
XPath: /button[@class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon"]
Example 3 View on Page
Target has insufficient size and spacing
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon" data-testid="clear-search" type="reset" aria-label="Borrar la Busqueda">...</button>
XPath: /button[@class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon"]
Example 4 View on Page
Target has insufficient size and spacing
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon" data-testid="clear-search" type="reset" aria-label="Clear Search">...</button>
XPath: /button[@class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon"]
Example 5 View on Page
Target has insufficient size and spacing
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon" data-testid="clear-search" type="reset" aria-label="Clear Search">...</button>
XPath: /button[@class="searchbox__input-container__reset-icon"]
5 Moderate alfa SIA-R78: Headings of same level have text content between them #
5 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://texas.gov/about/site-policies/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/acerca/politicas-del-sitio/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/help-support/frequently-asked-questions/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/behind-the-photo/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/detras-de-la-foto/ (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h3 class="accordion__title">Read more about accessibility policy </h3>
XPath: /h3[@class="accordion__title"]
Example 2 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h3 class="accordion__title">Leer más sobre la política de accesibilidad</h3>
XPath: /h3[@class="accordion__title"]
Example 3 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h3 class="accordion__title">What is Texas by Texas (TxT)?</h3>
XPath: /h3[@class="accordion__title"]
Example 4 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h2 class="h1">Get to know some local Texans</h2>
XPath: /h2[@class="h1"]
Example 5 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h2 class="h1">Conoce Algunos Tejanos</h2>
XPath: /h2[@class="h1"]

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The text of the paragraph is all italic
Mode: light
<p>Marsha left the lavish world of hospitality for a ...</p>
XPath: /p
Example 2 View on Page
The text of the paragraph is all italic
Mode: light
<p>Marsha dejó el lujoso mundo de la hospitalidad por...</p>
XPath: /p

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
All page content should be contained by landmarks
Mode: light
<div data-testid="alert" class="alert-banner alert-banner__type-2">
XPath: .alert-banner
Example 2 View on Page
All page content should be contained by landmarks
Mode: light
<div class="cookies-banner__description"><p>The site uses cookies to provide you with a great user experience. By using Texas.gov, you accept our use of cookies. For more detail, view our Site Policies.</p></div>
XPath: .cookies-banner__description
Example 3 View on Page
All page content should be contained by landmarks
Mode: light
<div data-testid="alert" class="alert-banner alert-banner__type-2">
XPath: .alert-banner

Mode: light
<div data-testid="alert" class="alert-banner alert-banner__type-2">

83 Moderate axe aria-allowed-role: #
3 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://texas.gov/about/site-policies/ (7 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/acerca/politicas-del-sitio/ (7 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/help-support/frequently-asked-questions/ (69 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
ARIA role should be appropriate for the element
Mode: light
<section tabindex="0" role="button" id="id__0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Read more about accessibility policy ">
XPath: #accessibility-policy > .accordion > section[role="button"]
Example 2 View on Page
ARIA role should be appropriate for the element
Mode: light
<section tabindex="0" role="button" id="id__0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Read more about privacy policy">
XPath: section[aria-controls="Read more about privacy policy"]
Example 3 View on Page
ARIA role should be appropriate for the element
Mode: light
<section tabindex="0" role="button" id="id__0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Read more about security policy ">
XPath: #security-policy > .accordion > section[role="button"]
Example 4 View on Page
ARIA role should be appropriate for the element
Mode: light
<section tabindex="0" role="button" id="id__0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Read more about linking policy">
XPath: section[aria-controls="Read more about linking policy"]
Example 5 View on Page
ARIA role should be appropriate for the element
Mode: light
<section tabindex="0" role="button" id="id__0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Read more about social media policy">
XPath: #social-media-policy > .accordion > section[role="button"]

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h4>About Us</h4>
XPath: .footer__list:nth-child(1) > h4
Example 2 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h4>About Us</h4>
XPath: .footer__list:nth-child(1) > h4
Example 3 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h4>About Us</h4>
XPath: .footer__list:nth-child(1) > h4
Example 4 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h4>About Us</h4>
XPath: .footer__list:nth-child(1) > h4
Example 5 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h4>Sobre nosotros</h4>
XPath: .footer__list:nth-child(1) > h4

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Blocking: No

Example 1 View on Page

Mode: light

Main landmark should not be contained in another landmark
Mode: light
<main class="w-2/3">

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://texas.gov/search/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/search/ (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
Mode: light
<main>
XPath: #gatsby-focus-wrapper > main
Example 2 View on Page
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
Mode: light
<main>
XPath: #gatsby-focus-wrapper > main

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text
Mode: light
<a class="main-nav__home-link" aria-label="Texas.gov home" href="/">

Mode: light

Example 3 View on Page
Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text
Mode: light
<button class="hamburger-wrapper" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Menu" type="button">
Example 4 View on Page
Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text
Mode: light
<button aria-label="Close" class="cookies-banner__close-icon-wrapper" type="button">
Example 5 View on Page
Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text
Mode: light
<button tabindex="0" aria-label="Start Chat" class="acOpenButton-0-0-12 acButtonStyles-0-0-3 " id="amazon-connect-open-widget-button">

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The HTML attribute(s) "http-equiv" is deprecated for the <meta> element in HTML 5
Mode: light
<meta content="ie=edge" http-equiv="x-ua-compatible">
Example 2 View on Page
The HTML attribute(s) "version" is deprecated in HTML 5
Mode: light
<svg version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 32 32" height="32px" width="32px" aria-labelledby="facebook-icon facebook-icon-description" data-testid="facebook-icon">
Example 3 View on Page
The HTML attribute(s) "version" is deprecated in HTML 5
Mode: light
<svg version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 32 32" height="32px" width="32px" aria-labelledby="instagram-icon instagram-icon-description" data-testid="instagram-icon">
Example 4 View on Page
The HTML attribute(s) "version" is deprecated in HTML 5
Mode: light
<svg version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 32 32" height="32px" width="32px" aria-labelledby="twitter-icon twitter-icon-description" data-testid="twitter-icon">
Example 5 View on Page
The HTML attribute(s) "http-equiv" is deprecated for the <meta> element in HTML 5
Mode: light
<meta content="ie=edge" http-equiv="x-ua-compatible">

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a href="https://www.texas.gov/help-support/frequently-asked-questions/#texas-by-texas-txt-">
Example 2 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a class="main-nav__home-link" aria-label="Texas.gov home" href="/">
Example 3 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<button aria-label="Search" class="search-icon__container">
Example 4 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<button class="hamburger-wrapper" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Menu" type="button">
Example 5 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a class="main-nav__home-link" aria-label="Texas.gov home" href="/">
170 Moderate equalAccess aria_id_unique: #
15 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://texas.gov/about/site-policies/ (7 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/acerca/politicas-del-sitio/ (7 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/help-support/frequently-asked-questions/ (69 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/driver-services/ (8 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/health-services/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/servicios-de-salud/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/living-in-texas/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/vivir-en-texas/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/public-safety/ (7 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/living-in-texas/accessibility-resources/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/vivir-en-texas/recursos-de-accesibilidad/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/living-in-texas/property-tax-arbitration/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/occupational-professional-licenses-in-texas/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/licencias-profesionales-laborales-en-texas/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/starting-a-business-in-texas/ (6 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The 'id' "Read, more, about, accessibility, policy" specified for the ARIA property 'aria-controls' value is not valid
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about accessibility policy " aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 2 View on Page
The 'id' "Read, more, about, privacy, policy" specified for the ARIA property 'aria-controls' value is not valid
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about privacy policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 3 View on Page
The 'id' "Read, more, about, security, policy" specified for the ARIA property 'aria-controls' value is not valid
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about security policy " aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 4 View on Page
The 'id' "Read, more, about, linking, policy" specified for the ARIA property 'aria-controls' value is not valid
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about linking policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 5 View on Page
The 'id' "Read, more, about, social, media, policy" specified for the ARIA property 'aria-controls' value is not valid
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about social media policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The ARIA role 'button' is not valid for the element <section>
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about accessibility policy " aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 2 View on Page
The ARIA role 'button' is not valid for the element <section>
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about privacy policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 3 View on Page
The ARIA role 'button' is not valid for the element <section>
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about security policy " aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 4 View on Page
The ARIA role 'button' is not valid for the element <section>
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about linking policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 5 View on Page
The ARIA role 'button' is not valid for the element <section>
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about social media policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The tabbable element does not have a valid widget role
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about accessibility policy " aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">
Example 2 View on Page
The tabbable element does not have a valid widget role
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about privacy policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">

The tabbable element does not have a valid widget role
Mode: light

Example 5 View on Page
The tabbable element does not have a valid widget role
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about social media policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">

Form control with "button" role has no associated label
Mode: light
<section aria-controls="Read more about social media policy" aria-expanded="false" id="id__0" role="button" tabindex="0">

Example 1 View on Page

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
Mode: light
<input aria-label="Search the website" placeholder="Search the website" value="" name="search" class="search-filter-bar__search-box" type="text">
Example 2 View on Page
The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
Mode: light
<input aria-label="Realizar una busqueda" placeholder="Realizar una busqueda" value="" name="search" class="search-filter-bar__search-box" type="text">
Example 3 View on Page
The input element does not have an associated visible label
Mode: light
<input aria-describedby="react-select-2-placeholder" role="combobox" aria-label="contactCode" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false" aria-autocomplete="list" value="" tabindex="0" spellcheck="false" id="react-select-2-input" autocorrect="off" autocomplete="off" autocapitalize="none" style="label:input;color:inherit;background:0;opacity:1;width:100%;grid-area:1 / 2;font:inherit;min-width:2px;border:0;margin:0;outline:0;padding:0" class="" type="text">
Example 4 View on Page
The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
Mode: light
<textarea placeholder="e.g., TxT, vehicle registration renewal, driver or license ID renewal, etc." name="txgovService" rows="3" required="" class="tx-textarea__input">
Example 5 View on Page
The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
Mode: light
<textarea placeholder="e.g. error message details, payment issue information (including payment date), etc." name="issue" rows="6" required="" class="tx-textarea__input">

Example 1 View on Page
Ensure the overlapped target "button" meets a minimum target size or has sufficient spacing from the overlapping target "input"
Mode: light

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Verify <frame> content is accessible
Mode: light
<iframe src="https://www.google.com/recaptcha/enterprise/anchor?ar=1&k=6Lf1fDQkAAAAALAXtEDpj-0yBX8abzzojsiH0G9z&co=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGV4YXMuZ292OjQ0Mw..&hl=en&v=QvLuXwupqtKCyjBw2xIzFLIf&size=invisible&anchor-ms=20000&execute-ms=30000&cb=3pdh0b1lwbqs" sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation allow-modals allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" scrolling="no" frameborder="0" name="a-xr1oj9i1rw6k" role="presentation" height="60" width="256" title="reCAPTCHA">
Example 2 View on Page
Verify <frame> content is accessible
Mode: light
<iframe aria-label="Youtube Video" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/videoseries?list=PLQxgYir_bwEeO5PKawMOHzN3KPeDpGH2j&controls=0&loop=1" height="100%" width="100%">
Example 3 View on Page
Verify <frame> content is accessible
Mode: light
<iframe aria-label="Behind the Photo Video Series Presented by Texas.gov" title="Behind the Photo Video Series Presented by Texas.gov" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/videoseries?si=Jc8GIKSDcQE8rSth&amp;list=PLQxgYir_bwEfgwXegUxoqNWpmB0f51ckX" class="promo-video__video-frame" height="100%" width="100%">
Example 4 View on Page
Verify <frame> content is accessible
Mode: light
<iframe aria-label="Behind the Photo Video Series Presented by Texas.gov" title="Behind the Photo Video Series Presented by Texas.gov" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/videoseries?si=Jc8GIKSDcQE8rSth&amp;list=PLQxgYir_bwEfgwXegUxoqNWpmB0f51ckX" class="promo-video__video-frame" height="100%" width="100%">

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Insufficient color contrast ratio of 1.36:1 (required 4.5:1).
Mode: light
<title id="search-icon">Search Icon</title>
XPath: #search-icon
Example 2 View on Page
Insufficient color contrast ratio of 4.24:1 (required 4.5:1).
Mode: light
<title id="facebook-icon" lang="en">Facebook</title>
XPath: #facebook-icon
Example 3 View on Page
Insufficient color contrast ratio of 4.24:1 (required 4.5:1).
Mode: light
<desc id="facebook-icon-description">A logo that leads to an outside link to facebook.</desc>
XPath: #facebook-icon-description
Example 4 View on Page
Insufficient color contrast ratio of 4.24:1 (required 4.5:1).
Mode: light
<title id="instagram-icon" lang="en">Instagram</title>
XPath: #instagram-icon
Example 5 View on Page
Insufficient color contrast ratio of 4.24:1 (required 4.5:1).
Mode: light
<desc id="instagram-icon-description">A logo that leads to an outside link to instagram.</desc>
XPath: #instagram-icon-description
112 Moderate accesslint aria/aria-allowed-role: #
15 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: accesslint

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://texas.gov/about/site-policies/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/acerca/politicas-del-sitio/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/help-support/frequently-asked-questions/ (23 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/driver-services/ (8 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/health-services/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/servicios-de-salud/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/living-in-texas/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/vivir-en-texas/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/public-safety/ (7 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/living-in-texas/accessibility-resources/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/vivir-en-texas/recursos-de-accesibilidad/ (9 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/living-in-texas/property-tax-arbitration/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/occupational-professional-licenses-in-texas/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/es/licencias-profesionales-laborales-en-texas/ (6 occurrences)
  • https://texas.gov/starting-a-business-in-texas/ (6 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Role "button" is not allowed on element <section>.
Mode: light
<section tabindex="0" role="button" id="id__0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Read more about accessibility policy "><div class="accordion__header-container" id="read-more-about-accessibility-po...
XPath: #id__0
Example 2 View on Page
Role "button" is not allowed on element <section>.

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Accessible name "Search" does not contain visible text "Buscar".
Mode: light
<button class="searchbox__search-btn" aria-label="Search" data-testid="search-submit">Buscar</button>
XPath: form > button[data-testid="search-submit"]
